description.en: Returns anAudioParamMap芒聙聰 a collection ofAudioParamobjects. They are instantiated during the creation of the underlyingAudioWorkletProcessor. If theAudioWorkletProcessorhas a staticparameterDescriptorsgetter, theAudioParamDescriptorarray returned from it is used to createAudioParamobjects on theAudioWorkletNode. With this mechanism it is possible to make your ownAudioParamobjects accessible from yourAudioWorkletNode. You can then use their values in the associatedAudioWorkletProcessor.

description.en: Ak-rateAudioParamthat defines the speed factor at which the audio asset will be played, where a value of 1.0 is the sound's natural sampling rate. Since no pitch correction is applied on the output, this can be used to change the pitch of the sample. This value is compounded withdetuneto determine the final playback rate.
